sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: 3D character movement on pre-rendered backgrounds
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Manny Calavera's 3D character model navigating static pre-rendered 2D backgrounds. Movement controlled via keyboard, joystick, gamepad, or mouse (remastered).

special_mechanics.name: Puzzle-based traversal
special_mechanics.description: Movement is primarily puzzle-solving driven rather than physics-intensive platforming. Player collects objects and interacts with environment through dialogue and item usage.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Adventure game with minimal documented movement physics. Sources contain only high-level gameplay descriptions and design philosophy, no quantitative movement parameters. Game emphasizes puzzle-solving and narrative over platformer-style physics mechanics.
